  "sql": "SELECT\n  SUM(dly_sls_agg.tot_sls_amt) AS daily_sales_agg_total,\n  SUM(CASE WHEN ord_hdr.sts_cd <> 'X' THEN ord_hdr.tot_amt ELSE 0 END) AS non_cancelled_order_revenue,\n  SUM(dly_sls_agg.tot_sls_amt) - SUM(CASE WHEN ord_hdr.sts_cd <> 'X' THEN ord_hdr.tot_amt ELSE 0 END) AS reconciliation_difference\nFROM main.dly_sls_agg\nFULL OUTER JOIN main.ord_hdr ON dly_sls_agg.agg_dt_key = ord_hdr.date_key AND dly_sls_agg.store_id = ord_hdr.store_id",
